runs.notes: First audit as new user. Major discoverability issues with hidden tabs (Teams, Memory, Reports). Session naming is broken. Default working directory points to Electron app bundle.

QA validation of Brain 2 fixes. 4 of 10 fixes verified (default cwd, model propagation, nav tabs, hidden tabs). 6 fixes could not be verified (no running sessions). 1 HIGH regression: Sessions empty state New Session button bleeds through to all tabs. 5 new low-to-medium issues found.

Full QA validation of Brain 2 batch 1+2 fixes. 10 of 15 fixes verified (session names, wizard close, Memory tab, session rename, workflows removed, toggle labels, button bleed-through, Memory rename, amber toggles). 5 fixes unable to verify (require running sessions). 0 regressions. 2 new issues: session empty state below Servers table (LOW), no sprint Cancel button (MEDIUM). All HIGH severity items now resolved.
